mapper.select: select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where is_active = true and ( ticker_normalized like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') or coalesce(name_ko_normalized, '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') or name_en_normalized like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') ) order by case when ticker_normalized = lower(trim(#{keyword})) then 1 when coalesce(name_ko_normalized, '') = lower(trim(#{keyword})) then 2 when name_en_normalized = lower(trim(#{keyword})) then 3 when ticker_normalized like concat(lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') then 4 when coalesce(name_ko_normalized, '') like concat(lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') then 5 when name_en_normalized like concat(lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') then 6 else 7 end, ticker_normalized asc limit 10

select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where id = #{id} limit 1

select id, ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where is_active = true and finnhub_symbol is not null order by id asc
select id from stocks where finnhub_symbol = #{finnhubSymbol} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into stocks ( ticker, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, is_active ) values ( #{ticker}, #{exchangeCode}, #{finnhubSymbol}, #{nameKo}, #{nameEn}, #{tickerNormalized}, #{nameKoNormalized}, #{nameEnNormalized}, #{searchText}, #{logoUrl}, #{marketType}, true ) on conflict (ticker, exchange_code) do update set finnhub_symbol = excluded.finnhub_symbol, name_ko = excluded.name_ko, name_en = excluded.name_en, ticker_normalized = excluded.ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized = excluded.name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized = excluded.name_en_normalized, search_text = excluded.search_text, logo_url = excluded.logo_url, market_type = excluded.market_type, is_active = true, updated_at = now()
mapper.update: update stocks set exchange_code = #{exchangeCode}, finnhub_symbol = #{finnhubSymbol}, name_ko = #{nameKo}, name_en = #{nameEn}, ticker_normalized = #{tickerNormalized}, name_ko_normalized = #{nameKoNormalized}, name_en_normalized = #{nameEnNormalized}, search_text = #{searchText}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, market_type = #{marketType}, is_active = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
